Source: OpenAI Status & Incidents
URL: https://status.openai.com/history.rss
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# OpenAI Status - Recent Incidents

## March 2026 (All Resolved)
- Mar 18: Sora Video Generation Failing - video generation error rates returned to normal
- Mar 17: Excel Plugin Inaccessibility - all impacted services recovered (Connectors/Apps)
- Mar 17: ChatGPT 5.4 Pro High Error Rates - all impacted services recovered (Conversations)
- Mar 17: Sign-In and Account Creation Issues - all impacted services recovered (Login/Auth)
- Mar 17: ChatGPT Free/Guest Plan Errors - all impacted services recovered (Conversations)

## Pattern Summary
Common affected areas: Conversations/ChatGPT messaging, Login/Auth, File uploads, Image/Video generation, Codex, API endpoints
All documented incidents show Resolved status.
